/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -flto -shared  -o PolyStokes.cpython-39-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/PolyStokes.dir/src/Stokes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PolyStokes.dir/src/run.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PolyStokes.dir/src/init.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PolyStokes.dir/src/arrays.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PolyStokes.dir/src/check_dist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PolyStokes.dir/src/multi_arrays_initialize.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PolyStokes.dir/src/mob.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PolyStokes.dir/src/rhs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PolyStokes.dir/src/vel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PolyStokes.dir/src/traj.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PolyStokes.dir/src/write_configuration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PolyStokes.dir/src/quat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PolyStokes.dir/src/pair_interaction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PolyStokes.dir/src/cleanup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PolyStokes.dir/src/bindings.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/petscdir/petsc3.15/x86_64-linux-gnu-real/lib:/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib: /usr/lib/petscdir/petsc3.15/x86_64-linux-gnu-real/lib/libpetsc_real.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi_cxx.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi.so
